name: WAPCOS – Field Engineer, Field Supervisor and More – 159 Posts

basic_details.job_title: WAPCOS Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 159 Field Engineer, Field Supervisor and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: WAPCOS Recruitment 2026 offers 159 vacancies for Field Engineer, Field Supervisor and More Posts. Eligible candidates with B.Tech/B.E, Diploma can apply online from 11-05-2026 to 26-05-2026 through the official WAPCOS website, wapcos.co.in.
basic_details.organization_name: RDSS (Revamped Distribution Sector Scheme) – TPI Projects
basic_details.post_name: Assistant Project Manager, Team Leader, Smart Metering Expert, Material Quality Expert, SCADA Expert, Cloud Infrastructure Expert, Cyber Security Expert, Field Engineer, Field Supervisor
basic_details.application_mode: CV submission via email only ([email protected])

salary_details.pay_scale: Salary commensurate with qualification & experience; to be discussed at interview

how_to_apply: Interested candidates must send their CV via email to [email protected] on or before 26.05.2026. The CV must be in the prescribed WAPCOS format only — applications submitted in any other format will be rejected. The subject line of the email should be in the format: CV for TPI-RDSS Project – (Name of Key Position) – (Years of Experience). The prescribed application proforma and further details are available on the official WAPCOS website www.wapcos.co.in.
seo_tags: Water and Power Consultancy Services Field Engineer
